REMILIA-REMILIA_RELIC_SCARLET_BLOOD.desc:
When losing HP, [blue]{HpLossReduction}%[/blue] of the HP lost is converted into a Blood Pool.
At the end of combat, [green]{BloodPoolLift}%[/green] of the remaining Blood Pool is stored as “Scarlet Blood” and is retrieved at the start of the next combat.
REMILIA-REMILIA_RELIC_SCARLET_BLOOD.flav: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
REMILIA-REMILIA_RELIC_RED_BLOOD.descript:
When losing HP, [blue]{HpLossReduction}%[/blue] of the HP lost is converted into a Blood Pool.

REMILIA-REMILIA_RELIC_RED_BLOOD.flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
REMILIA-REMILIA_RELIC_RED_BLOOD.title: Crimson Blood
